summary: Vijay Online Centre app with automatic payment receipt system. After successful UPI QR payment, the system auto-generates a digital receipt (payment slip) with customer details, payment details, unique receipt ID (VOC+timestamp), and allows PDF download. Admin marks payment as paid which triggers receipt generation and live updates.
architectural_notes: Receipt ID format: VOC + timestamp (e.g., VOC17092026)
UPI payment details: Paid To 8173064549@okicici, Receiver Name: Vijay Online Centre
Payment fields: status, paymentStatus, paymentDate on customer records

existing_features.title: Add a React Query mutation hook `useMarkPaymentSuccess` in `frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts` that calls the backend `markPaymentSuccess` function and invalidates the customers query on success.

Add a 'Mark as Paid' button in AdminPage.tsx for each customer record whose paymentStatus is not 'success'. Clicking it calls the useMarkPaymentSuccess mutation for that customer, transitions the button to a loading state, and on success shows a visual confirmation (green checkmark / 'Paid' badge) and disables the button. Display the receiptId in the admin row once available.

Create a new page `frontend/src/pages/ReceiptPage.tsx`. This page accepts a customerId (or mobile number) as a URL/route parameter, fetches the customer record, and renders a clean printable payment receipt when paymentStatus='success'. The receipt must include: (1) Header — 'Vijay Online Centre' and 'Successful Payment Receipt', (2) Customer Details — Customer Name, Mobile Number, Service Name, (3) Payment Details — Payment Status: SUCCESSFUL ✅, Amount Paid: ₹{amount}, Payment Method: UPI QR, Paid To (UPI ID): 8173064549@okicici, Receiver Name: Vijay Online Centre, Transaction Date & Time, (4) Receipt Number — the receiptId (VOC+timestamp). If paymentStatus is still 'pending', show a waiting/pending state and poll every 5 seconds to auto-refresh until payment is confirmed.

Style ReceiptPage with a clean, white, print-optimized design: center-aligned header with the business name in bold, a large green 'SUCCESS' text/badge at the top, clearly separated sections for customer and payment details in a card layout, and a receipt number displayed prominently at the bottom. Use the existing navy/saffron color palette for branding accents. Apply print-specific CSS (@media print) to hide navigation, buttons, and non-receipt content when printing.

Add a 'Print Receipt' button and a 'Download Slip' button to ReceiptPage. The Print button triggers window.print(). The Download Slip button uses the browser's print-to-PDF flow (or a client-side HTML-to-PDF library such as html2canvas + jsPDF) to generate and download a PDF of the receipt named 'VOC-Receipt-{receiptId}.pdf'.

Add a mobile number search feature to ReceiptPage (accessible via a public route). Render a search input at the top of the page that accepts a 10-digit mobile number. On search, fetch the matching customer record and display the receipt if paymentStatus='success', or show a 'Payment pending' message if not yet paid.

After the customer completes the payment step in PaymentPage.tsx (the success step), automatically redirect the customer to the ReceiptPage for their submission, passing the customerId as a route/query parameter.
Register the ReceiptPage route in App.tsx so it is accessible at a path such as '/receipt' (with optional query params for customerId or mobile number) without requiring admin authentication.

new_feature_requests.summary: Payment success flow: Admin marks record with status=paid, paymentStatus=success, paymentDate=timestamp after QR payment
Auto receipt generation when paymentStatus=success with customer details, payment details, UPI ID 8173064549@okicici, and unique receipt ID (VOC+timestamp)
Receipt UI: clean white printable design, center-aligned header, green success badge, big SUCCESS text, Print and Download PDF buttons
Customer auto-redirected to receipt page after payment; receipt viewable anytime via mobile number search
PDF download (Download Slip button) to generate PDF version of receipt
Live update: when admin marks payment successful, customer receipt page auto-refreshes and shows receipt instantly

Extend the backend Customer record to include paymentStatus (text: 'pending' | 'success'), paymentDate (optional timestamp in nanoseconds), and receiptId (optional text, format VOC+timestamp digits). Add a new update function `markPaymentSuccess(customerId)` that sets paymentStatus='success', paymentDate=current time, and generates a unique receiptId (e.g., 'VOC' + Int.toText(Time.now() / 1_000_000) truncated to a short numeric suffix). Ensure existing records default paymentStatus to 'pending' and receiptId to null.
